creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I'm closing this PR because it does not contain any details about the 
hardware nor have any proposal about how to deal with the problem. 

Please, become an active participant of the project by downloading and 
testing the images when we are doing BETA and RCs, and shout out loudly 
if you hit some bugs and these problems gets addressed.
